allowed_statement: A LIMEN process observed or transformed a stated source, case, cluster, crosswalk row, or artifact at a stated time.
forbidden_overread: Do not read this as truth of allegations, legal validity, compliance, safety, certification, or external witnessing.
next_threshold_to_upgrade: Keep emitting live receipts only for real bounded processing steps.

minimum_live_surface: live receipts spanning observed extracted classified reviewed clustered published superseded
allowed_statement: LIMEN can show machine-checkable observation-and-processing provenance across all lifecycle actions.
forbidden_overread: Do not present lifecycle coverage as corpus completeness, substantive correctness, or release authenticity.
next_threshold_to_upgrade: Only extend when another real lifecycle event occurs on shared artifacts.
paper_thesis_use: Results paragraph on full-lifecycle provenance coverage

minimum_live_surface: published artifact receipt plus shared bundle manifest and validation note
allowed_statement: LIMEN has one reviewer-checkable local shared publication bundle linking profile, schema, status, and shared consumer surfaces.
forbidden_overread: Do not describe the local bundle as a detached signature, transparency receipt, VC, trust-anchor binding, or external publication witness.
next_threshold_to_upgrade: Bind one stronger witness to the same manifest if a real release route becomes available.

minimum_live_surface: detached signature status signed_verified plus scheme signature ref trust anchor ref and verifier note
allowed_statement: Only after verification should LIMEN claim signer-bound release integrity for one published artifact.
forbidden_overread: Do not imply key ownership, signer identity trust, or allegation truth beyond the verified artifact boundary.
next_threshold_to_upgrade: Emit one real detached-signature verification note over the shared release bundle manifest.

minimum_live_surface: transparency receipt with verified inclusion proof
allowed_statement: Only after a verified inclusion proof should LIMEN claim public log inclusion for one published artifact.
forbidden_overread: Do not imply third-party endorsement, allegation correctness, or broader ecosystem interoperability beyond the stated receipt.
next_threshold_to_upgrade: Capture one real transparency receipt bound to the shared release bundle manifest.

minimum_live_surface: issued VC with credential id issuer and bounded process-only claim set
allowed_statement: Only after issuance should LIMEN claim a portable issuer-bound process receipt for the bounded artifact family.
forbidden_overread: Do not convert VC issuance into certification, compliance, truth, or legal validation.
next_threshold_to_upgrade: Issue one bounded process-only VC over a real LIMEN receipt family if governance permits.

minimum_live_surface: source-side C2PA/content-credential evidence on a relevant synthetic-media source
allowed_statement: Where source-side credentials exist, LIMEN may describe them as optional provenance signals attached to the source artifact.
forbidden_overread: Do not treat source-side C2PA presence as final authenticity, legality, harm, or authorship resolution.
next_threshold_to_upgrade: Populate only when a real case source exposes inspectable C2PA evidence.
